headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: Here's the latest news and reactions from our NBA insiders, including the latest on Kevin Durant's lingering ankle injury.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
headlines.description: From breaking news to the latest intel from around the NBA, here are the top highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Sixers can go to Boston and win Game 7
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith reacts to the 76ers' 106-93 win over the Celtics to force Game 7.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Knicks are going to the NBA Finals
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith reacts to the Knicks' blowout win over the Hawks and proclaims they will make the NBA Finals.

headlines.headline: Windhorst: Jokic's contract decision will shape Nuggets' future
headlines.description: Brian Windhorst and Shams Charania discuss what's next for Nikola Jokic and the Nuggets after their Round 1 loss to the Timberwolves.

headlines.headline: Shams: Jayson Tatum expected to play in Game 7
headlines.description: Shams Charania reports the Celtics expect Jayson Tatum to play in Game 7 vs. the 76ers after exiting with an apparent left leg injury.

headlines.headline: The Pick Is In: Behind the NFL Draft trailer
headlines.description: Here's a trailer for "The Pick Is In," a feature film that takes you behind the scenes of the NFL draft.

headlines.headline: Jordan Rodgers: Raiders must be patient with Mendoza
headlines.description: Jordan Rodgers explains why the Raiders must develop Fernando Mendoza to set up long-term success.

headlines.headline: Fantasy football mock draft: RB-RB is back, and where to draft the new rookie class
headlines.description: Running backs went early as 10 ESPN fantasy analysts made their first fantasy draft picks of the year

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL Rookie of the Year predictions: Ranking candidates
headlines.description: Which draft picks are set up to win Offensive and Defensive Rookie of the Year? Let's stack the top names to watch on each side of the ball.

headlines.headline: Cowboys DC Parker ready to mold Dallas' defensive draft picks
headlines.description: As rookie minicamp begins, Dallas is counting on its new coordinator to turn the defense around.

headlines.headline: Why the Jaguars revamped the tight ends room at the NFL draft
headlines.description: The Boerkircher pick was questioned by analysts but it supports the Jaguars plan to incorporate TEs more.

headlines.headline: What does Connor McDavid's future look like in Edmonton?
headlines.description: Greg Wyshynski examines Connor McDavid's future with the Oilers after being eliminated by the Ducks.

headlines.headline: Can Brandon Hagel keep the Tampa Bay Lightning alive?
headlines.description: After authoring the first Gordie Howe hat trick in franchise playoff history, the winger is critical to forcing a Game 7.

headlines.headline: NHL teams' offseason keys, including free agency, draft needs
headlines.description: We explore the next moves each team should make this summer and forecast expectations for 2026-27.

headlines.description: From the first round all the way through the Stanley Cup Final, ESPN has you covered this NHL postseason.

headlines.headline: Flyers visit the Hurricanes to open the second round
headlines.description: Philadelphia Flyers (43-27-12, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Carolina Hurricanes (53-22-7, in the Metropolitan Division)

headlines.headline: Connor McDavid says Oilers, ousted by Ducks, were 'average'
headlines.description: Star center Connor McDavid said the Oilers, ousted in the first round of the playoffs by the Ducks on Thursday night, "were an average team all year."
